'''zadolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:caballard|caballard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caballard|caballard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zadolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædeleth|zædeleth]] || [[word:zædelej|zædelej]] || [[word:zædelesh|zædelesh]] || [[word:zædele|zædele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadodoloth|zadodoloth]] || [[word:zadodoloj|zadodoloj]] || [[word:zadodolosh|zadodolosh]] || [[word:zadodolo|zadodolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadoloth|zadoloth]] || [[word:zadoloj|zadoloj]] || [[word:zadolosh|zadolosh]] || [[word:zadolo|zadolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadofloth|zadofloth]] || [[word:zadofloj|zadofloj]] || [[word:zadoflosh|zadoflosh]] || [[word:zadoflof|zadoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadolotho|zadolotho]] || [[word:zadolojo|zadolojo]] || [[word:zadolosho|zadolosho]] || [[word:zadoloko|zadoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadoloth|zadoloth]] || [[word:zadoloj|zadoloj]] || [[word:zadolosh|zadolosh]] || [[word:zadolo|zadolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadolothol|zadolothol]] || [[word:zadolojol|zadolojol]] || [[word:zadoloshol|zadoloshol]] || [[word:zadolokol|zadolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadolothotho|zadolothotho]] || [[word:zadolojojo|zadolojojo]] || [[word:zadoloshosho|zadoloshosho]] || [[word:zadoloko|zadoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadolothon|zadolothon]] || [[word:zadolojon|zadolojon]] || [[word:zadoloshon|zadoloshon]] || [[word:zadolokon|zadolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadolothoro|zadolothoro]] || [[word:zadolojoro|zadolojoro]] || [[word:zadoloshoro|zadoloshoro]] || [[word:zadolokoro|zadolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
